Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.genmp

Class GenMPC

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.genmp.GenMPC
public class GenMPC extends Object
Core implementation of the generalized modus ponens reasoner.

    • isGoalDependent

      public List<IHypAction> hypActions()

    • runGenMP

      public boolean runGenMP()
      Runs generalized Modus Ponens reasoner that generate the re-written goal and hypotheses and all the hypotheses needed to achieve it and all IHypActions computed. We first compute possible substitutes from hypotheses and goal. Then, we traverse each predicate to get the list of possible applications of substitutes and finally apply them.

    • extractSubstitutes

      private void extractSubstitutes()
      Extracts the substitutes from all hypotheses and the goal.

    • addSubstitute

      private void addSubstitute(Predicate origin, boolean fromGoal, Predicate source)

    • analyzePred

      private List<SubstAppli> analyzePred(Predicate origin, boolean isGoal)
      Returns a list of applications of substitutes to the given predicate. The returned applications are guaranteed to not overlap.
      Parameters:
      origin - the predicate to analyze (should be either a hypothesis or the goal)
      isGoal - true if origin is the goal
      Returns:
      a list of all possible substitution applications

    • rewriteGoal

      private void rewriteGoal()
      Rewrites the goal using the available substitute applications, updating the set of needed hypotheses and new goal.

    • rewriteHyp

      private void rewriteHyp(Predicate hyp)
      Rewrites the given hypothesis using the available substitute applications, producing new hypothesis actions and updating whether the rewrite depends on the goal.
      Parameters:
      hyp - the hypothesis
